services.title: Services

patients.title: Contacts
patients.subtitle: Patient contacts for all pipelines. Use filters to narrow down the list.

patientMerge.title: Merge Patients
patientMerge.subtitle: Select which data to keep from each patient. All records will be merged into the primary patient.
patientMerge.step1Desc: Choose which patient record to keep. All data from other patients will be merged into this one.
patientMerge.step2Desc: Click on any value to select it for the merged patient. By default, the primary patient's values are selected.
patientMerge.warningBody: This will merge all appointments, documents, consultations, deals, invoices, and other data into the primary patient. Files will be copied to the primary patient's folder. Other patient records will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Choose which view opens by default when you open a patient. Changes are saved automatically when you switch.

controllersPage.title: Controllers
controllersPage.subtitle: Manage user availability schedules and working hours for appointments.
controllersPage.selectUserHint: Choose a user from the dropdown above to view and edit their availability schedule.
controllersPage.aboutDesc: This controller allows you to set the working hours for each user/doctor per day of the week. The availability schedule is used to:
controllersPage.aboutItem1: Show available time slots when booking appointments
controllersPage.aboutItem2: Validate appointment times against user schedules
controllersPage.aboutItem3: Display availability warnings in the appointment modal
controllersPage.aboutItem4: Filter calendar views by doctor availability
controllersPage.aboutNote: Note: Changes take effect immediately after saving.
